title: 151 00948-12A SEALANT, White
features: WATERPROOF SEAL: 151 Multipurpose White Silicone Sealant, high quality seal, a flexible, durable weather strong seal for many common building surfaces.
DIY CARTRIDGE: 151 Multipurpose Selant, mould resistant, fits standard DIY cartridge caulking guns.
CLEAN TO USE, EASY TO APPLY: Always ensure that the surface is smooth, clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use Multipurpose Sealant. Colour: White. Store at room temperature.
